name: Don Burrows
abstract: Donald Vernon Burrows  (8 August 1928 – 12 March 2020) was an Australian jazz and swing musician who played clarinet, saxophone and flute.

about_quotes.speaker: Lisa Parrott
about_quotes.evidence: I owe my career to Don Burrows. He... got me playing baritone sax in the big band... I owe him everything actually.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lisa Parrott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 22, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Nicki Parrott
about_quotes.evidence: I met some wonderful people... Don Burrows, string and jazz legend. ... He started this jazz course at the Sydney Conservatorium.
about_quotes.doc_title: Nicki Parrott interviewed by Monk Rowe. Utica, New York, November 6, 2010 [interview 1 of 2]
